OKASSEN.import.title: Okassen — Item Import
OKASSEN.import.hint: Paste an extended item JSON (dnd5e + optional _forge block) and press "Create".
OKASSEN.import.targetHint: Optional. Leave empty to create the item in the world (sidebar). A token UUID works too.
OKASSEN.import.targetNotFound: No actor found for UUID "{uuid}". Check the UUID (right-click the actor → "Copy UUID") or leave the field empty.
OKASSEN.import.success: Item "{name}" created. You can paste the next JSON.
OKASSEN.notify.wrongSystem: Okassen: this module targets the dnd5e system — mechanics will not work in the current system.
OKASSEN.notify.nestedTooDeep: Okassen: nested items deeper than 2 levels on "{name}" were ignored.
OKASSEN.notify.nestedFailed: Okassen: failed to create nested item "{name}" — the rest of the import continued.
OKASSEN.notify.onUseUnregistered: Okassen: onUse handler "{handler}" (item "{item}") is not registered. The item was created, but its on-use logic will not fire until the handler is added via api.registerHandler.
OKASSEN.errors.notAnObject: The input must be a JSON item object (not an array or a string).
OKASSEN.errors.noName: The item is missing the required "name" field.
OKASSEN.errors.noType: Item "{name}" is missing the required "type" field.
OKASSEN.errors.badType: Unknown item type "{type}" on "{name}". Valid types: {types}.
OKASSEN.errors.badForge: The "_forge" block on "{name}" must be an object.
OKASSEN.errors.badOnUse: "_forge.onUse" on "{name}" must be a handler-id string or null.
OKASSEN.errors.badChange: Effect "{effect}" has a change without "mechanic" and without a "key" + "mode" pair — nothing to apply.
OKASSEN.errors.noValue: Effect "{effect}" has a change with no "value".
OKASSEN.errors.advantageNeedsMidi: Mechanic "{mechanic}" is not supported: plain dnd5e 4.4.4 has no Active Effect flags for advantage/disadvantage (except advantage.init for initiative). Such effects require the midi-qol module (flags.midi-qol.advantage.*) — you can pass its key as a raw change via key + mode.
OKASSEN.errors.badSetValue: Mechanic "{mechanic}": value "{value}" is not a valid key. Allowed values: {allowed}.
OKASSEN.errors.targetNotActor: The import target is not an actor.
